name: Sumit Kumar
short_intro: Sumit Kumar is a B.Tech Electrical and Electronics Engineering student at LNJPIT Chhapra, Bihar. He is interested in AI, Robotics, IoT, Embedded Systems, Full Stack Development, PCB Design, Cybersecurity, and Agentic AI.
role: B.Tech EEE Student | AI & Robotics Enthusiast | Full Stack Developer | Embedded Systems Learner
career_goal: To become an AI and Robotics Engineer and build real-world intelligent systems using AI, embedded systems, IoT, robotics, and full-stack development.

projects.name: Medical AI Assistant
projects.description: A medical-focused AI assistant built using Next.js and AI APIs to answer health-related questions in a safe and guided way.

projects.name: AC to DC Converter PCB
projects.description: A KiCad-based PCB design project for converting AC input into filtered DC output using rectifier and filtering circuitry.

projects.name: Smart Security IoT System
projects.description: A NodeMCU ESP8266-based security system using PIR sensor, IR sensor, LED indication, Firebase database, and local IP monitoring.

projects.name: AI-Based Gender Detection Drone
projects.description: A project concept where ESP32-S3 Camera runs a lightweight AI model and sends detection results to a phone while the drone is flown using FlySky transmitter.

projects.name: TurtleBot3 ROS2 Simulation
projects.description: A ROS2 simulation project using TurtleBot3, RViz, and teleoperation for learning robot navigation and visualization.

projects.name: Sumit Kumar
projects.headline: AI & Robotics Engineer Aspirant | Full Stack Developer | AI/ML Enthusiast

education.college: Loknayak Jai Prakash Institute of Technology (LNJPIT), Chhapra

projects.career_goal: To become an AI and Robotics Engineer, build innovative AI-powered products, and contribute to the future of intelligent systems and robotics.

startup.name: MediMind AI
startup.description: AI-powered medical assistant platform designed to provide intelligent healthcare guidance and multilingual healthcare support.

achievements: National Finalist Top 150 in Cloud Innovation Challenge
Bihar Youth Festival Science & Technology Participant

profile_answers.who_is_sumit: Sumit Kumar is a B.Tech Electrical and Electronics Engineering student at LNJPIT Chhapra, Bihar. He is passionate about AI, Robotics, Embedded Systems, IoT, Full Stack Development, PCB Design, Cybersecurity, and Agentic AI.
profile_answers.what_is_sumit_goal: Sumit's career goal is to become an AI and Robotics Engineer and build intelligent real-world systems.
profile_answers.what_can_sumit_build: Sumit can build AI applications, IoT systems, embedded projects, PCB designs, full-stack web applications, robotics simulations, and personal AI agents.
profile_answers.why_hire_sumit: Sumit is a multidisciplinary learner who combines electrical engineering with AI, robotics, embedded systems, and software development. He has practical experience with projects across AI, IoT, PCB, and full-stack development.
